text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Nature & Ikuno
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year.
Happy New Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and Matikanetannhauser has
brought her friends to hang out in my office.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, we all made mochi together and I
wanted to share some with you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it! And also... Is it still in your
office?
choice_data_list: Is what still in my office?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You know what! The kotatsu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly invite the four cold Umamusume into
my office to warm up under the kotatsu.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Look, Nature! I'm a snail!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, stop messing around... But wow, they really
are the best. I can feel my fatigue just melting
away.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Right?! There's no better way to spend New
Year's than chowing down on some mochi and
oranges under the kotatsu.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser, shouldn't you show your trainer that
thing we were discussing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh! Right! Take a look at this, Trainer. It's this month's Twinkle Monthly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! Look, it's got my name written in it right
here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look where she's pointing and, sure enough, the
name "Matikanetannhauser" is written in small
print.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's a feature on up-and-comers! It says, "The race
gave me the impression she could go on to do
great things."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a closer look, thinking it would be best to
read it carefully since she brought it all the way
over here, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smack-dab in the center of the page, I see the
words "Mihono Bourbon: Top Pick for Triple
Crown Champion" written much larger.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon has been in the spotlight for
some time, but... Hm. I didn't realize expectations
were this high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The size of a headline indicates the level of
interest and the current public sentiment. Seeing
this would unnerve anyone prone to worrying
over such things.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You're right. Tannhauser is—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow, they wrote about Bourbon too! Top
pick for the Triple Crown? That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She works so hard every day, I can see why
people have such high hopes for her. She's always
running up and down that ramp...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll just have to work hard too! That's it, I'm
aiming to be Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, sorry. I interrupted you two, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll be cheering you on from the sidelines.
Keep going just the way you are this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few hours later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's time for our first ever heart-pounding New
Year's Luck Tourney!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, everyone has ended up playing New
Year's games.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now then, this tournament will have three events!
The first is the "Stick-it-Out Kendama
Showdown," where whoever takes the ball around
the world first wins!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Next is the "Running Kite Showdown," where the
person who flies their kite highest wins!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Finally, we have the "You Laugh, You Lose
Fukuwarai Showdown!" Arrange your facial
features the best to win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
As for which game comes first, that's up to the
owner of this office—Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I guess the first one I want to try is...
choice_data_list:
The "You Laugh, You Lose Fukuwarai
Showdown"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Great choice! I've actually picked out a spacious
spot that's perfect for this game! Drumroll
please...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Near the overpass!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
This does appear to be an apt location. There are
no other people around, and not a power line in
sight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! Then let's get this match underway!
Trainer's the judge!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Turbo engine... engage!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's really high! Not bad, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! I can go even faster than that! Rrraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to withstand such intense acceleration,
the kite string breaks, and the kite itself
disappears from sight almost instantly.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! My kite!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh no. That's... really far away.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if we're just considering height, Turbo's the
winner, right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I suppose so. Assuming she's not disqualified, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I won?! Aaawesome! Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, great job!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As our day of fun comes to an end, the curtain
rises on the second year of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, nice choice! I've actually been doing a little
practice recently!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Going around the world means catching the ball
in the small cup, then the big cup, then the
middle cup and, finally, on the spike!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Everyone ready? And... go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hup, hah... Gah!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of clacking wood echoes throughout
my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And night falls...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
This task is... far more difficult than I had
anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Don't sweat it! It's not over yet!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Grr! I can keep going too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, my hand's starting to hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As our day of fun comes to an end, the curtain
rises on the second year of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! I've actually prepared a special
fukuwarai set!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, she takes out a paper nose, eyes,
and other facial features, as well as sheet of
paper with the outline of...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I made a set based on Trainer's face!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm the one who looks at Trainer's face the
most, so I should have this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
In fact, there's no way I can lose! Let's throw
down!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, is this... the mouth?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. You've got it wrong, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Button it, Turbo! Don't help her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After some more fiddling around, the result is...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The nose is in the correct place, but the mouth is
wrong. You get seventy-five points!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyah! I didn't get a perfect score!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer! How did I mess this up?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As our day of fun comes to an end, the curtain
rises on the second year of the Twinkle Series.
